import pineconeIcon from '../../assets/pinecone.png'; import crewaiIcon from '../../assets/crewai.png'; import qwenIcon from '../../assets/qwen.png'; import moltbotIcon from '../../assets/moltbot.png'; const tickerItems = [ { text: 'Agent', icon: agentIcon, invert: true }, { text: 'LLM', icon: llmIcon, invert: true }, { text: 'MCP', icon: mcpIcon, invert: true }, { text: 'Network', icon: networkIcon, invert: true }, { text: 'API Security', icon: apiIcon, invert: true, small: true }, { text: 'Identity', icon: identityIcon, invert: true }, { text: 'Access', icon: accessIcon }, { text: 'Discovery', icon: discoveryIcon, invert: true }, { text: 'ChatBot', icon: chatIcon, invert: true }, ]; const Main = () => { return ( <>

))}

); }; export default Main;
